title: Account to Account Transfer Request
description: A request to transfer funds from one account to another

amount.description: The amount (in cents) to transfer from originating account to receiving account.

currency.description: ISO 4217 alphabetic currency code of the transfer amount

dest_account_alias.description: An alias representing a GL account to credit. This is an alternative to specifying by account id

dest_account_no.description: The account number of the account being credited

effective_date.description: The date the transaction should be effective

memo.description: A short note to the recipient

offset_description.description: A description of the offsetting transaction

posted_date.description: The date the transaction was posted

source_account_alias.description: An alias representing a GL account to debit. This is alternative to specifying by account id

source_account_no.description: The account number of the account being debited

subtype.description: The desired transaction subtype to use for this transfer

type.description: The desired transaction type to use for this transfer
